/local/scratch/yw737/cheri_poison/output/sdk/bin/clang -O0 -target riscv64-unknown-freebsd -march=rv64gcxcheri -mabi=l64pc128d -mno-relax --sysroot=/local/scratch/yw737/cheri_poison/output/sdk/sysroot-riscv64-purecap -fuse-ld=lld "CMakeFiles/CWE457_Use_of_Uninitialized_Variable__struct_array_alloca_partial_init_13-bad.dir/s01/CWE457_Use_of_Uninitialized_Variable__struct_array_alloca_partial_init_13.c.o" -o /local/scratch/yw737/cheri_poison/juliet-test-suite-c/bin/CWE457/bad/CWE457_Use_of_Uninitialized_Variable__struct_array_alloca_partial_init_13-bad  /local/scratch/yw737/cheri_poison/juliet-test-suite-c/bin/support/libsupport.a -lpthread -lm
